Chief Technology Officer — MegaCorp International

Location: New York, NY (Hybrid)
Company: MegaCorp International (Fortune 200 | $15B Revenue | 45,000 employees)

About the Role:
We are seeking a transformational CTO to lead our global technology strategy, drive innovation, and position MegaCorp as a digital-first enterprise. This executive will report directly to the CEO and serve as a member of the Executive Leadership Team.

Key Responsibilities:
- Define and execute a 5-year technology roadmap aligned with business strategy
- Lead a global technology organization of 2,000+ across 20+ countries
- Drive cloud transformation and AI adoption across all business units
- Manage an annual technology budget of $500M+
- Partner with the Board of Directors on technology governance and risk management
- Lead M&A technology integration for strategic acquisitions
- Establish data-driven decision-making culture across the enterprise
- Ensure cybersecurity resilience and regulatory compliance (SOX, GDPR, CCPA)

Required Qualifications:
- 15+ years of progressive technology leadership experience
- Track record of leading organizations with 1,000+ technology professionals
- Experience managing technology budgets of $200M+
- Proven success in large-scale digital transformation (cloud, AI/ML, data)
- International leadership experience across multiple regions
- M&A technology integration experience
- Strong executive presence and Board-level communication skills
- MBA or advanced degree preferred

Desired Qualifications:
- Fortune 500 CTO or SVP-level experience
- Experience in manufacturing, logistics, or industrial sectors
- Track record of driving $100M+ in measurable business impact
- Published thought leadership or industry conference speaking experience
- Experience building innovation labs or incubation programs
